name: VISTOP 67" Non-Slip Splash Pad for Kids and Dogs, Thickened Sprinkler Pool for Toddlers, Outdoor Backyard Water Toys, Fun Fountain Play Mat for Babies, Children & Pets Blue
bullets: NON-SLIP DESIGN: When playing with water on splash mat, 4-8 ages children are easy to fall and be injured. The non-slip texture is designed to increase grip and allow children to enjoy the water Sprinkler in the backyard while ensuring safety.

UPDATE UPGRADE: Heavy Duty splash pads BEST for dogs to play water sprinkler pool. VISTOP kid splash pad without BPA and phthalates is fun water toys. Let toddlers 1-3 get close to nature and enjoy the wonderful summertime.

MORE THICKNER MORE DURABLE: The dog splash pad is 0.55MM, which is thicker and more durable than other 0.25mm splash pads, so pets dog and children can play on it without worrying about being damaged by the paws of the pet. Tip: Pets need to trim their nails first when playing water mat.

DOUBLE EDGE DESIGN：8mm widened circular edge sealing helps to bear water pressure and prevent cracking during use. The water sprinkler level can be adjusted by water faucet pressure. The direction of spraying (inward/outward) can be adjusted by adjusting the tube.

BACKYARD WATER PARTY: Holding a water party on the 59-inch sprinkler fun toy for KID/PET to provide enough play space and just the right cool fun with their families. Small Splash Pad suitable for outdoor activities, backyards, beaches and lawns.

reviews.name: Rick
reviews.title: Well constructed summer fun for kids, adults, and DOGS!
reviews.body: I am not one who reviews products, EVER. If I were I would NEVER give 5 stars, nor 1 star. However, I had to take the time to review this splash pad and give it a 5/5 stars. I expected it to be poorly constructed for under $40. I love the ease of setting up and taking down. I love the sturdy nature. It is well constructed of strong material that really is slip proof and puncture proof! And you…

reviews.name: colleen sullivan
reviews.title: 127 inch Splash Pad
reviews.body: This was one of my best and favorite Amazon Purchases! I never write reviews but this was so incredibly easy to set up myself for my three grandsons ages 4, 6 and 8 yrs old who literally had the time of their lives yesterday playing on this awesome Splash Pad!! They laughed and giggled for hours! I am a very picky toy buyer and this was worth every penny seeing the smiles on their faces!! It kept…

reviews.name: Jessica
reviews.title: Loved it !
reviews.body: Loved this ! Definitely worth the money. Would give it a five but it came with a small hole on the side which I had to fix. Other than that it’s great for kids ! Easy to set up not hard at all. Loved the color of it and the water that comes out is perfect. Great for a summer day !

reviews.name: William Budrow
reviews.title: Durable, great value
reviews.body: We have had this splash pad for 3 years and it was the best $23 I have spent for my boys!We use it constantly on our driveway, patio, and in the yard of our brew build home that has more rocks than grass and it has held up amazing.As expected the plastic has faded due to the sun but it is in great working condition and I would not hesitate to buy another if this one were to get a hole.
